texto: In the ancient and medieval world, the exploration of physical influences among heavenly bodies, and between the heavenly bodies and objects on earth, was generally called ‘astrology.’ But we must not confuse this with the current socially acceptable form of bigotry that seems to entitle the human beings who believe in it to prejudge the character of others based solely on their dates of birth.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert P. Crease sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “In the ancient and medieval world, the exploration of physical influences among heavenly bodies, …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, astrology, science, útil em momentos de science.
